description: Style NoteThe camisole is feminine and fashionable at any given point and this camisole from jockey is designed keeping feminine slenderness in mind. Wear it alone or layered under shirts and jacketsProduct DetailsBlack camisole that has fashionable ultra soft, adjustable straps that rest comfortably on your shoulders and leaves no marks on your skin. The trendy logo straps makes a style statement of its ownMaterial and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanFlat dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
